title: thymus thracicus var. montenegrinus
intro: Thymus thracicus var. montenegrinus, also known as the Montenegrin thyme, is a subspecies of the thyme plant that belongs to the mint family Lamiaceae. It is an aromatic, evergreen herb that is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in folk medicine, due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Thymus thracicus var. montenegrinus include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to make topical applications for skin issues and wounds, as well as to add flavor and fragrance to food and beverages.
